candidates.why: Explicit current maturities of long-term debt; fits short-term debt/current portion definition and excludes leases.
Looks like a current borrowing line on the balance sheet and could represent short-term debt in years where current maturities are not separately shown.
Current financing liability but explicitly lease-related, which should be excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: No clean single total current borrowings row is reported. Used the minimal non-lease debt components that appear to capture STD: current maturities of long-term debt plus Credit Facility. Excluded lease liabilities per rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Also a direct match and likely used in another period.

variables.notes: Both labels are clear tax payable variants across periods; provided as priority list.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet PPE-type total/net line available and preferable to accumulated depreciation line.
Explicit gross PPE total; useful alternative where reported.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total by itself.
Balancing line, not primary reported PPE measure.
Wrong asset class.

variables.notes: Preferred the cleaner reported net/total PPE-type line 'Tangible Assets'; included explicit gross PPE total as secondary label for periods where that taxonomy is used.
